name: 300 Watt LED Shoebox Light | 48000 Lumens | 5700K
description: 300 Watt shoebox – parking lot fixture produces 48000 lumens and has durable die-cast aluminum housing that is powder coated with strong anti-corrosion performance for years of maintenance-free lighting. The fixture comes in a dark bronze finish.
short_desc: Key Features Wattage: 300 Lumens: 48000 Lumens Per Watt: 160 Replaces: 1000 Watt Metal Halide Voltage: 100V-277V or 277V-480V Optional Color Temperature: 5700K CRI: 70+ Dimming: No Beam Angles: Type 5 Standard, Type 3 Optional Optics: Polycarbonate Lens Lifespan: 244,000 (L70) hours Mounting: Wall or Yoke or Arm or Slip Fitter EPA Rating: 2 Fixture Color: Bronze Frequency: 50-60Hz Power Factor: > .92 THD: < 15% Durable Construction Housing: Die-Cast Aluminum IP Rating: IP65 IK Rating: IK08 Surge Protection: 6kV line-line, 10kV line-earth Operating Temperature: -22°F to +113°F Certifications: ETL | DLC Premium Warranty: 10 (100-277v) – 5 (277-480v) years Measurements Dimensions: 24.61 in L X 11.93 in W X 3.22 in H Weight: 17 lbs Cord Length: 5 Feet Features/Accessories Motion Sensor Photocell
